sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19296" key="bamba/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαμβάκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n19296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">highway, causeway,</tr_> Cyr.Dresd.</sense> </entryFree>
